input.code: (function() { try { const allElements = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')); for (let el of allElements) { if (el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim() === 'Only') { const parent = el.closest('li, [role="listitem"], div[data-iid]'); if (parent && parent.textContent.includes('Delta')) { el.click(); return 'Clicked Only next to Delta'; } } } return 'Only button not found by text search'; } catch(e) { return 'Error: ' + e.message; } })()

input.code: (function(){var spans=document.querySelectorAll('li span, button span, [role="option"]');var allText=[];document.querySelectorAll('*');var els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div,span,button'));var onlyEls=els.filter(function(el){return el.textContent.trim()==='Only' && el.offsetParent!==null});return onlyEls.length + ' only buttons found, first: ' + (onlyEls[0]?onlyEls[0].outerHTML.substring(0,200):'none')})()
